summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GJC AI-CRM application. All 28 backend API tests passed. All 8 frontend modules working correctly with proper navigation, data display, and Romanian UI.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Environment variables are used correctly for MONGO_URL and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
seed_data_creation: Data imported from 2 Excel files: 315 candidates, 37 companies, 75 immigration cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: Dashboard KPIs (315 candidates, 37 companies, 75 cases, 1 alert), Candidates module with search, Companies module with ANAF CUI lookup, Immigration cases with 8 Romanian stages, Alerts grouped by priority (Critical/Urgent/Attention) with 'Vezi Dosar' button, Pipeline with 5 columns, Documents and Reports modules. All UI in Romanian language.
